questions.question:
Which of the following statements is/are correct?



GATE DA 2025 | Question: 15
options: \( \mathbb{R}^{n} \) has a unique set of orthonormal basis vectors
\( \mathbb{R}^{n} \) does not have a unique set of orthonormal basis vectors
correct_answer: \( \mathbb{R}^{n} \) does not have a unique set of orthonormal basis vectors

questions.question:
​​​​Let \( x_{1}, x_{2}, x_{3}, x_{4}, x_{5} \) be a system of orthonormal vectors in \( \mathbb{R}^{10} \). Consider the matrix \( A=x_{1} x_{1}^{\top}+\ldots+x_{5} x_{5}^{\top} \). Which of the following statements is/are correct?



GATE DA 2025 | Question: 40
options: Singular values of \( A \) are also its eigenvalues
Singular values of \( A \) are either \( 0 \) or \( 1 \)
correct_answer: Singular values of \( A \) are also its eigenvalues
Singular values of \( A \) are either \( 0 \) or \( 1 \)
